Excellent. So let's jump right in.

with Special Olympics here in the United States. There they have an event

Worldwide Technology is a global technology solutions provider. Excellent. So let's jump right in. Talk to me about AI coding agents. How did AI agents come onto your radar? what prompted you to explore them and get involved in that technology? What types of tasks are customers using like what's working in this space? Yeah, my background is in software engineering. So, I came to worldwide because a company that I founded that did software engineering services was acquired by worldwide. So as soon as generative AI came along and we saw the power of what it could do with code my team immediately got interested in what was going on and started playing around with these tools and trying to figure them out. And I think ever since then there's been momentum and interest in how to use this both internally to build applications for ourselves but also seeing this as really a revolutionary way that the it will change software engineering and the whole software development life cycle for everyone. Absolutely. There is no question that there's a lot of hype and interest around generative AI and all the things that it's capable of doing and the value that it could potentially bring. But that brings me to my question around where is the value? how do you currently measure or assess the impact of AI for your customers leveraging coding agents and can you share any examples of how specifically it's accelerated projects or solve difficult problems or any surprises that you found when you're working with your customers regarding leveraging this exciting new technology? There they have an event this June and they asked us to help them with their mobile app that is going to be the companion for what everyone is working with throughout the Special Olympics. Yes, Jim. And we all know the expression trust but verify. I think when it comes to generative AI coding, it could be verify then trust. Is it going to be used to train models? is it going to be stored somewhere? And it was hard for them to know and so there were a lot of customers asking about that.
